Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Morbid Solitude
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Pack Size: +25% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +41% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +15% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +95% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Fleeting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 15(10-15)% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed
{ Prefix Modifier "Destructive" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 206(200-240)% increased Critical Hit Chance
Monsters have +25(21-25)% Critical Damage Bonus
{ Prefix Modifier "Tough" (Tier: 1) }
23(20-25)% more Monster Life
{ Suffix Modifier "of Obstruction" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters take 29(26-30)% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Hits
{ Suffix Modifier "Flaming" (Tier: 1) }
Area has patches of Ignited Ground
{ Suffix Modifier "of Drought" (Tier: 1) }
Players gain 34(35-30)% reduced Flask Charges
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
